name: Thorfinn Karlsefni
title: The Seeker of Vinland
description: Evolves from a vengeance-obsessed child soldier into an enslaved farmer, and ultimately to an expedition leader seeking a pacifist utopia.

name: Askeladd
title: The System Manipulator
description: A cunning mercenary leader harboring immense self-loathing for his Norse heritage while weaponizing its rules to protect his secret homeland, Wales.

name: King Canute
title: The Apex Optimizer
description: The Danish Prince who rejects divine salvation, opting instead to seize earthly power to force a bloody, manufactured paradise upon humanity.

title: The Troll of Jom

title: The War Enthusiast
description: A massive, jovial warrior who lives exclusively for battle, shifting allegiances purely to find stronger opponents and avoid peacetime.

title: The Empathy Anchor
description: A resilient farmer enslaved alongside Thorfinn who refuses to yield to hatred despite losing everything, grounding Thorfinn in human empathy.

name: Retributive Violence
title: Macro-System Economy
description: The foundational law of Scandinavian society where conflict resolution via peace is penalized as cowardice, and physical dominance equates to value.

name: Valhalla Protocol
title: Psychological Death Override
description: The deeply ingrained mythos that dying honorably in combat guarantees entry to eternal paradise, removing the fear of death from warriors.

name: Information Asymmetry
title: Strategic Friction Exploitation
description: The tactical manipulation of predictable Warrior mindsets, weather conditions, and political greed to defeat mathematically superior forces.

name: Absolute Pacifism
title: Counter-System Firewall
description: The revolutionary philosophy that 'A true warrior needs no sword', rejecting the binary categorization of 'enemies' entirely.

name: The Danish Crown
title: systemic
description: An imperialistic monarchy optimized for resource extraction and territorial expansion across Scandinavia and England.

name: The Jomsvikings
title: antagonist
description: An elite, disciplined brotherhood of mercenaries operating as an independent military corporation with absolute rigid rules.

name: Ketil's Farm
title: neutral
description: A massive agricultural enterprise presenting itself as an economic haven but structurally reliant on slavery and outsourced violence.

name: The Lnu
title: chaotic
description: The indigenous tribes inhabiting Vinland, introducing profound socio-cultural friction to Thorfinn's pacifist settlement.
